properties.name: Stonehenge
properties.summary: Prehistoric stone circle in southern Britain.

properties.name: Newgrange
properties.summary: Passage tomb famous for winter solstice alignment.

properties.name: Gobekli Tepe
properties.summary: Prehistoric monumental site in southeast Turkey.
properties.quest: Ask whether temples came before cities.

properties.name: Catalhoyuk
properties.summary: Dense early settlement with houses and wall art.
properties.quest: Compare village life with later city systems.

properties.name: Lascaux
properties.summary: Cave art site associated with Ice Age image-making.
properties.quest: Ask what art can reveal before writing exists.

properties.name: Altamira
properties.summary: Major prehistoric cave art site in northern Spain.
properties.quest: Compare natural cave forms with painted figures.
